project_name: MySQL to BigQuery Data Ingestion Pipeline

columns.name: employee_id
columns.description: Unique employee identifier sourced from MySQL primary key EMPLOYEE_ID. Uniqueness enforced post-load per acceptance criteria.

columns.name: first_name
columns.description: Employee first name; sourced from varchar(50) column FIRST_NAME.

columns.name: last_name
columns.description: Employee last name; sourced from varchar(50) column LAST_NAME.

columns.name: email
columns.description: Employee email address; sourced from varchar(100) column EMAIL.

columns.name: phone_number
columns.description: Employee phone number; nullable in source, NULL values pass through.

columns.name: hire_date
columns.description: Date the employee was hired; direct DATE-to-DATE mapping.

columns.name: job_id
columns.description: Job role identifier; sourced from varchar(20) column JOB_ID. Used as tertiary clustering column.

columns.name: salary
columns.description: Employee salary with two decimal places; sourced from decimal(8,2) column SALARY.

columns.name: commission_pct
columns.description: Commission percentage applicable to sales roles; nullable, sourced from decimal(4,2).

columns.name: manager_id
columns.description: Employee ID of the direct manager; self-referential FK to employee_id. NULL for top-level employees.

columns.name: department_id
columns.description: Department identifier; nullable if unassigned. Used as leading clustering column for department-scoped analytics.

columns.name: status
columns.description: Employment status (e.g. ACTIVE, INACTIVE); low-cardinality, used as secondary clustering column.

columns.name: created_date
columns.description: Record creation timestamp; NOT NULL, used as partition column (DAY granularity) to scope full and incremental load windows.

columns.name: updated_date
columns.description: Record last-update timestamp; delta tracking column for incremental loads. Pipeline uses COALESCE(updated_date, created_date) >= last_watermark for safe extraction.

cardinality.notes: Many employees may report to one manager via the manager_id -> employee_id self-join. Top-level employees carry NULL in manager_id.
